description: Verso (original use): Fragment of a petition in Arabic script. The petitioner complains that the ىىن (= the fig trees? the straw?) have been moved from one place to another. The addressee is asked to inform a higher-up (the royal council?) that they belong to the petitioner (lil-khādim) and that they can't just be moved around.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
